steps.title: Set up the book total
steps.content:
Let $c$ be the number of children. The librarian gives each child $4$ books and has $6$ books left over, for a total of $78$ books.
$$4c+6=78$$

steps.title: Solve for children
steps.content:
Subtract $6$, then divide by $4$.
$$4c=72$$
$$c=18$$
The answer is B.
